news.headline: Avance Gas Holding Ltd announces $0.75 per share dividend in USD. Key dates: Last day incl right (March 4), Ex-date (March 5), Record date (March 6), Payment date (March 14). Contact CFO for queries.
news.summary: In Hamilton, Bermuda, on February 28, 2025, details concerning an exceptional dividend announcement are as follows: The dividend amount is $0.75 in USD. The last day to be included in this dividend is March 4, 2025. The ex-dividend date is set for March 5, 2025, while the record date is March 6, 2025. The payment date for this dividend is March 14, 2025. The dividend was approved on February 28, 2025. For any further inquiries, please reach out to Randi Navdal Bekkelund, the Chief Financial Officer, via email at IR@avancegas.com or by phone at +47 23 11 40 00.

news.headline: Metallus announces Q4 and full-year 2024 earnings, stock symbol MTUS on NYSE, details released.
news.summary: In Canton, Ohio, on February 28, 2025, Metallus (NYSE: MTUS), a prominent provider of top-notch specialty metals, manufactured components, and supply chain services, disclosed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The report was unveiled on February 27 at the New York Stock Exchange.

news.headline: Santander Chile files 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F with SEC after fiscal year ending Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: Santiago, Chile - On Feb. 28, 2025, Banco Santander Chile disclosed the submission of its 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Santander Chile, also known as the Company, operates under the tickers NYSE: BSAC and SSE: Bsantander. The report covers the financial year concluding on December 31, 2024, providing crucial insights for stakeholders.

news.headline: Stocks surge before PCE; China promises tariff talks. Brief 02/28/2025
news.summary: Stocks saw an increase in value as they surged prior to the release of the Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) data. In addition, China has pledged to engage in discussions regarding tariffs. This news was reported in the Bloomberg Brief on February 28, 2025.

news.headline: AI stocks facing challenges: Snowflake up 12%, Nvidia down 10%, Google down 11% in 2025. Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Three major AI stocks have experienced varying performances in 2025. Snowflake shares have surged by 12%, while Nvidia stock has dropped by 10% and Google stock is down by 11%. This fluctuation in stock value reflects a pivotal moment for tech giants and cloud titans in the AI industry. The overall sentiment suggests a need for these companies to demonstrate their worth to investors. Nvidia, in particular, has seen a significant decrease in its stock value once again, indicating challenges in the market.

news.headline: Companies believe customers love their service, but disagreements arise. Focus on enhancing customer service.
news.summary: Many businesses believe their customer service is well-received by clients, yet customers may have a differing opinion. To improve customer service, companies should concentrate their efforts on enhancing it. This approach can lead to better client satisfaction and loyalty.

news.headline: Novartis' Fabhalta® (iptacopan) receives positive CHMP opinion for treating C3 glomerulopathy in adults. New oral Factor B inhibitor.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, Novartis disclosed that the CHMP of the EMA has issued a favorable opinion endorsing the approval of Fabhalta® (iptacopan), an innovative oral Factor B inhibitor targeting the alternative complement pathway. This recommendation is for the marketing authorization of Fabhalta® for the therapy of C3 glomerulopathy (C3G) in adult patients. Fabhalta® marks a significant advancement in the treatment of C3G and presents a promising option for those affected by the condition.

news.headline: Avance Gas Holding Ltd sold MGC fleet, announces $0.75/share special dividend.
Bowman wins $6M contract from Montebello, CA for engineering services, with potential for up to $10M over 5 years.
news.summary: Bowman Consulting Group Ltd., a leading engineering services firm, has secured a significant contract worth $6 million with the City of Montebello, California. This on-call design and engineering services agreement is set to span three years, with an annual revenue generation of $2 million. Additionally, the contract offers the possibility of two one-year extensions, potentially expanding the partnership to five years and increasing the total worth to $10 million. As a part of the agreement, Bowman will deliver crucial design and engineering services to enhance the infrastructure of Montebello.

news.headline: Krystal Biotech's VYJUVEK® for Dystrophic Epidermolysis Bullosa gets positive CHMP opinion, EC decision expected in Q2 2025.
news.summary: Anticipation is high for the decision on EC approval, expected to be made in the second quarter of 2025. This decision carries significant weight in terms of product viability and market entry, with stakeholders eagerly awaiting the outcome as it could potentially shape the future of the product. The second quarter of 2025 marks a crucial timeline for this decision, with various implications for all involved parties including investors, consumers, and competitors.

news.headline: Olin plans to offer $600 million in senior notes due 2033 in private offering. Clayton, Mo. - Feb. 28, 2025.
news.summary: Olin Corporation (NYSE: OLN) has disclosed plans to launch an offering of $600 million in aggregate principal amount of senior notes due 2033. The company stated that the offering is subject to various conditions, including market conditions. The Senior Notes will be issued by Olin Corporation as part of their financial initiatives.

news.headline: Jersey Mike's 15th Annual Month of Giving in March; 100% sales fund local charities on March 26; aiming to raise record amount.
news.summary: On March 26, all sales at Jersey Mike's Subs in Manasquan, New Jersey will be donated to local charities. This initiative, called the "Day of Giving," aims to generate funds for charity on a large scale. Jersey Mike's Subs, a popular chain restaurant celebrated for its genuine freshly sliced and grilled subs, hopes to achieve a new fundraising record this March. Customers are encouraged to participate by purchasing a sub on this day to support the cause.

Permuto Capital announces amended registration statement and 2 new registration statements for novel equity product with SEC. Trusts formed have filed for public offerings.@admin
news.summary: In a recent announcement from Permuto Capital LLC, a collaboration between 3V Capital Partners SE LLC and Chia Network Inc., it was revealed that two new voting trust investment vehicles created by Permuto have submitted registration statements to the Securities and Exchange Commission for upcoming public offerings of a unique equity product. Permuto will serve as the trust administrator for the offerings. This marks a significant development in their strategic investment plans and demonstrates a commitment to further diversification in the financial markets. Stay tuned for more details as the process unfolds.

news.headline: Odd Burger Corp. reports Q1 2024 revenue of $727,294 with net loss of $(272,476). Focus on expansion and tech innovation.
news.summary: Odd Burger Corporation has reported their financial results for the first quarter ending December 31, 2024. The company's revenue for the quarter was $727,294, with a net loss of $(272,476). CEO James McInnes expressed satisfaction with the results, highlighting the expansion of their national chain to 20 units across Canada and growth in their consumer-packaged goods line. The company aims to increase revenue and further develop technology to differentiate themselves in the industry. Full details available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: UAE regulations boost asset tokenization trend; Tokinvest CEO says demand high in RWA sector for 7 years.
news.summary: In a recent statement, Scott Thiel, the founder and CEO of Tokinvest, mentioned his seven-year experience in the RWA sector revealing a consistent trend of strong demands from asset owners to tokenize their properties. He emphasized the sustained interest and eagerness among asset owners to explore tokenization opportunities for their properties, indicating a continuous and growing interest in this sector.

news.headline: Arcos Dorados to redeem 5.875% Notes due 2027 (CUSIP Nos. 03965U AC4 / G0457F AC1), at redemption price of 100%.
news.summary: Uruguay based Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO) has revealed plans to redeem all of its 5.875% senior notes due 2027. The company intends to send a notice of redemption to the holders of the Notes following the guidelines of the indenture governing these notes. As per the terms of the Indenture, the Notes will be redeemed at a price equivalent to 100% of the outstanding principal amount. This move signifies a strategic decision by Arcos Dorados to manage its financial obligations.

The volume guidance for metallurgical coal shipments in 2025 has been lowered to a range of 14.5 million to 15.5 million tons. Additionally, the full-year cost of coal sales guidance has been increased to a range of $103.00 to...

news.headline: NAPCO Security Technologies (NASDAQ: NSSC) to attend Raymond James 46th Institutional Investors Conference on March 5, 2025 in Orlando, FL.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in Amityville, New York, NAPCO Security Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: NSSC) announced their position as a top designer and producer of advanced electronic security products. The company specializes in offering wireless recurring communication services for intrusion detection, fire alarms, access control, and locking systems.

news.headline: Lanvin Group revenues decline by 23% to €328 million in FY2024 due to creative and strategic transitions in response to market challenges.
news.summary: In the fiscal year of 2024, there was a revenue of €328 million, showcasing a 23% decline from the previous fiscal year of 2023. This decrease was a result of a period focused on creative advancement and strategic realignment to adapt to challenging market conditions. While St. John and Caruso remained strong and steady, other brands within the company underwent revitalization efforts to establish a new presence in their respective markets.

news.headline: IAS reports strong Q4 results: Revenue up 14% to $153M, net income $15.3M, adjusted EBITDA $61.4M.
news.summary: In the last quarter of the year, Integral Ad Science reported a revenue growth of 14%, reaching $153 million. The net income for the same period stood at $15.3 million, representing a 10% margin. Additionally, the adjusted EBITDA for the fourth quarter surged by 29% to $61.4 million, with a margin of 40%. These results were revealed in New York on February 28, 2025, by the renowned global media company listed on Nasdaq as IAS.

news.headline: Zimmer Biomet will present at the 27th Barclays Healthcare Conference on March 13, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. disclosed today that executives from the company will participate in the 27th Annual Barclays Healthcare Conference on March 13, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. ET. The event will be presented by members of the management team and is set to be broadcasted live. Zimmer Biomet is listed on the NYSE and SIX under the ticker symbol ZBH.

news.headline: Research report on Titanium Mineral Concentrates (Ilmenite and Rutile) industry, covering global market data from 2019-2024 with forecasts up to 2034.

news.headline: Kobo Resources grants 1,550,000 stock options at $0.35 per share to directors, officers, and employees. #investing
news.summary: In Quebec City, Kobo Resources Inc. (TSX.V: KRI) has disclosed the granting of 1,550,000 options to buy common shares under its Stock Option Plan. These options have been awarded to designated directors, officers, and employees, allowing them to purchase common shares at $0.35 per share over a period of 10 years from the grant date.

news.headline: Bitcoin drops below $80,000 as crypto crash continues. Spot Bitcoin ETFs saw $3.2B outflows over 8 days, with $3.65B in Feb.
news.summary: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has been on a downward spiral, plummeting to as low as $78,433 early on Friday morning. This drop can be attributed to a significant streak of outflows from U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs, which have reached $3.2 billion over an eight-day period. This is the longest negative streak since the launch of these ETFs. In February alone, there has been a net outflow of $3.65 billion, with only four days of inflows so far this month. The largest outflow occurred on Tuesday, reaching a record $1.14 billion. BlackRock’s (NASDAQ: IBIT) Bitcoin ETF, the largest in terms of net assets, also saw a substantial outflow during this period.

news.headline: Renowned economist Ginger Jin joins Compass Lexecon, a subsidiary of FTI Consulting, Inc. (NYSE: FCN), enhancing its capabilities.
news.summary: FTI Consulting, Inc. revealed on February 28, 2025, that Dr. Ginger Jin has joined its subsidiary, Compass Lexecon. Dr. Jin's affiliation with the company is significant as she brings expertise in economics and competition policy. FTI Consulting, listed on the NYSE as FCN, stated that the move aims to enhance the services provided by Compass Lexecon.

news.headline: PAR Technology Corp reports Q4 2024 results. 21% organic ARR growth, positive Adjusted EBITDA, CEO Savneet Singh positive.
news.summary: PAR Technology Corporation, a company listed on NYSE with the symbol PAR, released its financial results for Q4 and the full year ending on December 31, 2024. The CEO, Savneet Singh, highlighted a successful fourth quarter showing a 21% organic ARR growth year-over-year. This marked the second consecutive quarter of positive Adjusted EBITDA, demonstrating the company's progress towards its goals. The year 2024 was described as a significant milestone for PAR, with notable organic growth.

news.headline: FuboTV closed 2024 with $1.59B revenue, 1.676M paid subscribers in North America, marking key financial improvements.
news.summary: FuboTV Inc., known as Fubo and traded as FUBO on NYSE, revealed its financial performance for Q4 and full year ending on Dec 31, 2024. The company wrapped up 2024 in North America with all-time high total revenue and paying subscribers. They marked their initial quarter of positive free cash flow and boosted key profitability metrics by over $100 million annually for the second consecutive year. Fubo also achieved significant growth in various areas.

news.headline: Bioventus (Nasdaq: BVS) to report Q4 FY 2024 results on March 11, 2025. Conference call at 8:30 am Eastern Time.
news.summary: Durham-based company Bioventus Inc. (Nasdaq: BVS) will release its financial results for Q4 of fiscal year 2024 on March 11, 2025. The report will be available before the market opens, with a conference call scheduled for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day led by the Company’s management to discuss the results and give a business update. Bioventus is known for its global leadership in innovative solutions for active healing.

news.headline: AGM Holdings partners with HashBeaver for blockchain and AI innovation; combines mining resources with expertise to drive advancements in Bitcoin mining & AI.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, Beijing-based AGM Group Holdings Inc. ("AGM Holdings" or "the Company") revealed a strategic partnership deal with HashBeaver, a cloud mining platform in the digital currency financial industry. AGM Holdings, listed as NASDAQ: AGMH, specializes in producing and selling high-performance hardware and computing equipment. The Agreement combines AGM Holdings' mining resources in Canada with HashBeaver's computing power services to drive advancements in Bitcoin mining and artificial intelligence (AI) services.

news.headline: Zevra launches 'Learn NPC, Read Between the Signs' campaign for early recognition and treatment of Niemann-Pick Disease Type C.
news.summary: A recently launched campaign called "Learn NPC, Read Between the Signs" aims to raise awareness about Niemann-Pick Disease Type C (NPC). The goal is to promote early detection and treatment of this rare condition. NPC is a debilitating genetic disorder that primarily affects children, with an estimated incidence of 1 in 100,000 live births. By educating the public about the signs and symptoms of NPC, the campaign hopes to improve early recognition and management of the disease, ultimately improving outcomes for those affected.

news.headline: Report highlights trends in US pet health market, covering pet food, supplies, vet services. Shows impact of owner attitudes on buying decisions.

The inaugural edition of this report examines pet owner perspectives on health and wellness and how these considerations impact their purchasing and service utilization decisions. This expanded focus on pet health incorporates various aspects beyond medical conditions, encompassing a wide array of products and services. Global leader CoinW at Consensus HK 2025 as 4 Block sponsor, highlighting blockchain innovation and partnerships.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on February 28, 2025, CoinW, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange company, stood out at Consensus HK 2025 as a major sponsor with a sponsorship level of 4 Blocks. This demonstrated their commitment to blockchain advancements, forming key partnerships, and engaging with the community.

news.headline: Votes in AB Volvo change with 10,000 Series A shares to Series B shares conversion. Series A shareholders granted opportunities.
news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on February 28, 2025, the voting structure in AB Volvo saw a shift as 10,000 Series A shares were converted into an equal number of Series B shares. This conversion has led to alterations in the voting rights within the company. Series A shareholders were given the chance to exchange their shares as part of the process.

news.headline: AMA introduces new Category 1 CPT® codes for thyroid nodule RFA, expanding access to minimally invasive treatment.
news.summary: Physicians now have an enhanced opportunity for reimbursement and more widespread availability of minimally invasive thyroid treatment in Los Angeles, as per the latest news as of February 28, 2025. RFA For Life has expressed satisfaction with the recent development, revealing that the American Medical Association (AMA) has introduced new Category 1 CPT® codes for this purpose. This advancement is anticipated to streamline billing processes and improve access to treatment for patients seeking the procedure.

news.headline: Inflation on the rise as consumer sentiment drops due to high prices. How will this affect Trump's tariffs and economic agenda?
news.summary: A decline in consumer sentiment has been noted due to high prices putting a strain on households. This downturn could potentially hinder key parts of the president’s economic plans, such as tariffs.

news.headline: Successful completion of A shares to B shares conversion as per articles of association. Adjusted voting rights and share capital now in effect.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the number of COVID-19 cases has surged by 15% this week in the country. There were a total of 10,000 new cases recorded, bringing the total number of cases to 75,000. Health officials have expressed concern over the rapid increase in cases and have urged the public to adhere to safety guidelines such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing. Additionally, there have been 150 new deaths reported, raising the total number of fatalities to 2,500. The government is considering implementing stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus and protect public health.

Perrigo announces plan at Investor Day to consumerize, simplify, and scale self-care platform, starting at 8:00 AM EST.
news.summary: In Dublin on February 28, 2025, Perrigo Company plc (NYSE: PRGO), a prominent supplier of Consumer Self-Care Products, revealed at its Virtual Investor Day kicking off at 8:00 AM EST, that the management will present its strategy to streamline, simplify, and enhance consumer experience.

news.headline: Lubrication Engineers to acquire Royal Purple's Industrial Brands & Products. Leading industrial lubricants manufacturer.
news.summary: In Wichita, Kansas on February 28, 2025, Lubrication Engineers, Inc. ("LE"), a prominent producer of high-performance industrial lubricants and asset reliability solutions, revealed their plans to acquire industrial brands. This acquisition marks a significant development in the industry, showcasing LE's commitment to expansion and innovation. The deal is set to boost LE's market presence and offer enhanced solutions to their clients. This move solidifies LE's position as a key player in the sector, indicating a positive trajectory for the company.

news.headline: Boralex launches normal course issuer bid to purchase and cancel up to 8,669,245 shares, representing 10% of public float.
news.summary: Boralex Inc. has announced a normal course issuer bid (NCIB) approved by the Toronto Stock Exchange to repurchase for cancellation up to 8,669,245 Class A shares over a twelve-month period starting from March 4, 2025. This represents about 10% of the "public float" of Common Shares, which were 102,766,580 issued and outstanding as of February 19, 2025. The buyback will be conducted on the TSX or other eligible trading systems in Canada, or outside the TSX with regulatory approvals. Shares will be bought at market price plus fees, with exemption orders purchased at a discount. Any repurchased shares will be canceled.

news.headline: AGF Investments plans to terminate 12 funds and 5 ETFs as part of a restructuring process.
Strategist warns of declines in the 'bro bubble'.
Best Buy (NYSE:BBY) forecasts $2.41/share earnings (down from $2.72), $13.7B revenue (down from $14.65) for Q4. Shares closed at $88.62, down 2%.
news.summary: Consumer electronics retailer Best Buy Co., Inc. (NYSE: BBY) is set to announce its Q4 financial results on March 4, 2025, before the market opens. Analysts predict earnings of $2.41 per share, a decrease from $2.72 in the same period last year. The company expects quarterly revenue of $13.7 billion, down from $14.65 billion year-over-year. Following a disappointing fiscal Q3 report on Nov. 26, 2024, Best Buy's stock slid 2% to close at $88.62 on Thursday. For more details, including analyst ratings, visit Benzinga's website.
